name: ingest
_note: worldmodel.ingest (LENS_ACTIONS handler). Sets/increments a numeric attribute on a target entity and appends an immutable log row. A poisoned (Infinity/NaN/1e308/over-long) value is coerced by num() to a finite number — the stored attribute is ALWAYS finite (pinned by the numeric-guard suite). An unknown entityId fail-CLOSES to ok:false 'target entity not found' rather than fabricating one — so both fuzz cases (empty input; ghost entity in the assassin's empty world) expect ok:false. LENS_ACTIONS-served; exercised in server/tests/worldmodel-lens-macros.test.js, not by the MACROS-only assassin.
